'''hosazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeallow|yeallow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeallow|yeallow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hosazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hosazithi|hosazithi]] || [[word:hosaziji|hosaziji]] || [[word:hosazishi|hosazishi]] || [[word:hosaziki|hosaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hosazuthuthu|hosazuthuthu]] || [[word:hosazujuju|hosazujuju]] || [[word:hosazushushu|hosazushushu]] || [[word:hosazukuku|hosazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hosazuthu|hosazuthu]] || [[word:hosazuju|hosazuju]] || [[word:hosazushu|hosazushu]] || [[word:hosazuku|hosazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hosazufthuf|hosazufthuf]] || [[word:hosazufjuf|hosazufjuf]] || [[word:hosazufshuf|hosazufshuf]] || [[word:hosazufkuf|hosazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hosazethe|hosazethe]] || [[word:hosazeje|hosazeje]] || [[word:hosazeshe|hosazeshe]] || [[word:hosazeke|hosazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hosazothotho|hosazothotho]] || [[word:hosazojojo|hosazojojo]] || [[word:hosazoshosho|hosazoshosho]] || [[word:hosazokoko|hosazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hosazotho|hosazotho]] || [[word:hosazojo|hosazojo]] || [[word:hosazosho|hosazosho]] || [[word:hosazoko|hosazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hosazofthof|hosazofthof]] || [[word:hosazofjof|hosazofjof]] || [[word:hosazofshof|hosazofshof]] || [[word:hosazofkof|hosazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfthÃŸf|hosazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfjÃŸf|hosazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfshÃŸf|hosazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfkÃŸf|hosazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|hosazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|hosazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|hosazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|hosazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfthÃŸf|hosazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfjÃŸf|hosazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfshÃŸf|hosazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfkÃŸf|hosazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfthÃŸf|hosazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfjÃŸf|hosazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfshÃŸf|hosazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hosazÃŸfkÃŸf|hosazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hosazÃḊthÃḊ|hosazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:hosazÃḊjÃḊ|hosazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:hosazÃḊshÃḊ|hosazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:hosazÃḊkÃḊ|hosazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hosazathatha|hosazathatha]] || [[word:hosazajaja|hosazajaja]] || [[word:hosazashasha|hosazashasha]] || [[word:hosazakaka|hosazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hosazatha|hosazatha]] || [[word:hosazaja|hosazaja]] || [[word:hosazasha|hosazasha]] || [[word:hosazaka|hosazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hosazafthaf|hosazafthaf]] || [[word:hosazafjaf|hosazafjaf]] || [[word:hosazafshaf|hosazafshaf]] || [[word:hosazafkaf|hosazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hosazasha|hosazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hosazshÃḋsha|hosazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hosazrosha|hosazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hosazmusha|hosazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hosazyasha|hosazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohosaznkshÃḋsha|gohosaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohosaznkrosha|gohosaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohosaznkmusha|gohosaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohosaznkyasha|gohosaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hosasazasha|hosasazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hosasazshÃḋsha|hosasazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hosasazrosha|hosasazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hosasazmusha|hosasazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hosasazyasha|hosasazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohosasaznkshÃḋsha|gohosasaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohosasaznkrosha|gohosasaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohosasaznkmusha|gohosasaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohosasaznkyasha|gohosasaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hesÃḊzasha|hesÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hesÃḊzshÃḋsha|hesÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hesÃḊzrosha|hesÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hesÃḊzmusha|hesÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hesÃḊzyasha|hesÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohesÃḊznkshÃḋsha|gohesÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohesÃḊznkrosha|gohesÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohesÃḊznkmusha|gohesÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohesÃḊznkyasha|gohesÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hosfazasha|hosfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hosfazshÃḋsha|hosfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hosfazrosha|hosfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hosfazmusha|hosfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hosfazyasha|hosfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohosfaznkshÃḋsha|gohosfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohosfaznkrosha|gohosfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohosfaznkmusha|gohosfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohosfaznkyasha|gohosfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
